Today kicks off Amazon’s Big Spring Sale and FLEXISPOT has loads of offers for you to scope out. Pricing starts from $30 and markdowns slash as much as 55% off. My top pick is the FlexiSpot Q4 55-inch Rattan Standing Desk for $113.99 shipped. During 2026, pricing has bounced between $135 and $220, the latter of which is where it spent a lot of its time last year. This particular standing desk sets itself apart with a unique rattan style that breaks the traditional mold we generally see in this product category. The surface spans 55 inches, which should be enough space for two or more monitors depending on what your setup looks like. Head below to find more standing desks, office chairs, monitor arms, and more.

items.title: Outfit your Apple Home with Aqara doorbells, sensors, more from $15 during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (Up to 34% off)

Amazon’s Big Spring Sale has landed and the price drops just keep coming. We’ve uncovered a lengthy list of Aqara smart home gear as low as $15. The drops are impressive, and you stand to save as much as 34%, which is a high number for the likes of Aqara. My top pick is the brand’s Aqara Video Doorbell G4 with Chime at just $59.99 shipped. This unit generally sells for $90 in 2026, but prior to that it sold for $120 most of the time. Today’s deal delivers the best Amazon price we’ve tracked, beating out the previous low by $10. I’ve been personally using this doorbell for a couple of years now and love the HomeKit Secure Video integration. You can also find hands-on review coverage right here. Head below to find loads of other Aqara smart home gear on sale.

items.title: Explainer-Can the US government be held liable for the LaGuardia Airport collision?
items.summary: NEW YORK, March 25 (Reuters) - Investigators are probing the potential causes of Sunday's ⁠collision between an Air Canada Express plane and a fire truck at LaGuardia Airport in New York. items.title: Turn one USB-C port into two with this retractable 100W cable, now down to $15 (Save 40%)
items.summary:
Baseus Retractable 100W 2-in-1 USB-C Cable

Buy for $15 (Reg. $25)

Enter promo code 4OI7TCQ9 during checkout for $8 off.

What we love

A 2-in-1 cable like this would come in handy when you only have a single USB-C power source available. It can split up to 100W of power between two devices, so you can use it to, say, power both your phone and laptop at the same time even if the charger only has a single Type-C output. This unit also has a retractable design to make it convenient for travel or everyday use.

This is a fairly new and quite popular model that hit the scene earlier this year for $40. Today’s deal shaves $12 off its usual going rate with a 30% discount, marking a new best price to beat. It’s available in a handful of finishes, but only the black and white variants are down to $28 today while the rest are at the $30 mark. Head below for more details, along with deals on other Anker chargers.

more…
